name: ca77y-agentic
description: Personal agentic toolkit: a Claude Code + Antigravity (agy) development pipeline and research-library crew, shared from one repo. Two plugins over one content pool, scoped via marketplace config.

plugins.name: ca77y-engineering
plugins.description: Idea-to-shipped development pipeline as Claude Code subagents + skills: researcher, analyst, linear-story, planner, stack-planner, engineer, qa, and the gemini dispatcher (delegates to agy). Skills: analyst, planner, antigravity-cli, gh-stack.

plugins.name: ca77y-library
plugins.description: Markdown research-library crew executed on Antigravity (agy): librarian (cited answers), scribe (ingest/synthesis), clerk (health/audit). Invoked by the engineering pipeline's gemini dispatcher.
